name: "Cum-Sen" The Cumflation Spa
description:
CUMFLATION

Yeah you read that right, it is as stupid and depraved as it sounds.

Story

You live in a world where women enjoy going to a Onsen that is filled with cum instead of water. It helps them relax after a hard day at work or at home. However the semen has to come from somewhere. You have the ability to cum with liters of fresh, thick love juice that's why you were hired.

SPOILERS

I really tried my best but it still isn't quite working as I intend. I keep updating it but for now I hope it works for you. The idea behind this is that for the women there, Cum helps them relax. Even though everything is described sexual, the women aren't aroused or horny. They just want to tell you about their day and get pumped full of your fresh semen.

I'm not the best with generating these pictures, but I try my best <3
